description.ko: 보이지 않는 소리가 진동하는 선, 날카로운 순간 파형, 드문 조화 노드로 이루어진 절제된 리듬 악보가 된다.
description.en: Invisible sound becomes a sparse rhythmic score of vibrating lines, sharp transient cuts, and rare harmonic nodes.

prompt: ECHO-0 sound visualization composed as a floating acoustic notation field above matte warm-white paper, seen from a steep editorial top-down angle like a silent score with no instrument, performer, speaker, core, sphere, corridor, membrane, glass, ice, chip, or dark void. The unheard rhythm appears as ultra-thin #4169E1 royal-blue waveform strokes threaded through irregular staff fragments, each line tightening into fast #FF4500 orange diagonal attack cuts at sudden transient peaks. Sparse #FFD700 gold consonance dots hover only where separate frequencies momentarily synchronize, while rare #32CD32 lime-green rest ticks offset the spacing like syncopated timing corrections. Keep the composition airy and precise: broad empty margins, crisp ink-like edges, tiny lifted shadows under the fastest strokes, clipped amplitude bends, low particle count, and a rhythmic visual tempo that makes silent vibration feel measurable.
